title: crambe steveniana
intro: Crambe steveniana, also known as Crambe maritima, is a perennial, coastal plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its saponin and polyphenol content. The health benefits of Crambe steveniana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and protect against oxidative stress. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Crambe steveniana are made by infusing the roots or leaves in water or oil to create teas, tinctures, or topical creams.
